properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Trading punches with the heart of darkness Going to blows with your fear incarnate Never gone until it's stripped away A part of you has gotta die today

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the morning you gon' need an answer Ain't nobody gonna change the standard It's not enough to just feel the flame You've gotta burn your old self away

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hold on tight a little longer What don't kill ya, makes ya stronger Get back up, 'cause it's a hard love You can't change without a fallout It's gon' hurt, but don't you slow down Get back up, 'cause it's a hard love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You know the situation can't be right And all you ever do is fight But there's a reason that the road is long It takes some time to make your courage strong

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When the wolves come and hunt me down I will face them all and stand my ground 'Cause there's a fire burnin' in me They will see my strength in this love I found Oh

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It's a hard love, it's a hard love, it's a hard love, it's a hard love Oh, it's a hard love, it's a hard love, it's a hard love, it's a hard love Oh, it's a hard love, it's a hard love, it's a hard love, it's a hard love

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Hold on tight a little longer What don't kill ya, makes ya stronger Get back up, 'cause it's a hard love You can't change without a fallout It's gon' hurt, but don't you slow down Get back up, 'cause it's a hard love 'Cause it's a hard love
